What We Treat

Comprehensive Fertility &
Gynaecology Services

From IVF to prenatal care, every treatment is tailored to your unique journey with clinical precision and compassionate support.

IVF Treatment

Advanced In Vitro Fertilization with cutting-edge lab technology and personalized protocols for maximum success rates.

Learn More

IUI Treatment

Intrauterine insemination as a less invasive first-line fertility treatment for eligible couples.

Learn More

Fertility Testing

Comprehensive fertility workup including hormone panels, ultrasound scans, and semen analysis.

Learn More

PCOS / PCOD Care

Integrated hormonal and fertility-focused care for PCOS/PCOD with long-term cycle and health management.

Learn More

High-Risk Pregnancy Care

Maternal-fetal monitoring and specialist support from conception through delivery for high-risk pregnancies.

Learn More

Gynaecology

Complete women’s health services including menstrual disorders, preventive care, and minimally invasive procedures.

Learn More
20+ Years
Our Expert

Dr. Priya Sharma

MBBS · MD (Obs & Gyn) · Fellowship in Reproductive Medicine

With over two decades of experience in reproductive medicine, Dr. Priya Sharma is Delhi's most trusted name in IVF and fertility care. She has helped over 2,000 families achieve the joy of parenthood through compassionate, evidence-based treatment.

Specializing in recurrent IVF failures, poor ovarian reserve, and complex infertility cases — she combines advanced technology with a deeply personal approach to every patient's journey.

NABH Accredited IVF Specialist Laparoscopic Surgeon FOGSI Member ISAR Member
2000+
IVF Cycles
75%
Success Rate
5.0★
Patient Rating
Book with Dr. Sharma
Your Path to Parenthood

Simple. Guided. Supported.

Every IVF journey at LAMNIST follows 4 clear steps — so you always know where you are and what comes next.

01

Initial Consultation

A warm, private consultation to understand your history, concerns, and fertility goals. No judgment — just care.

02

Diagnosis & Testing

Comprehensive blood work, ultrasounds, semen analysis, and hormonal profiling to precisely identify the cause.

03

Personalized Treatment

A custom IVF or fertility protocol designed specifically for your body — not a one-size-fits-all approach.

04

Pregnancy Success

Continued support through your pregnancy journey — from embryo transfer to delivery, we celebrate with you.

Start Your Journey — Book Free Consultation
FAQ

Common Questions

LAMNIST combines personalized fertility planning with advanced IVF protocols, transparent counselling, and close clinical follow-up so every couple receives a treatment path built for their specific case.

Success rates vary by age, ovarian reserve, embryo quality, and medical history. We provide case-specific success expectations after diagnosis and focus on evidence-based protocols to maximize outcomes.

Yes. We routinely evaluate recurrent IVF failures, perform deeper diagnostics, and redesign protocols with targeted interventions before the next attempt.

Absolutely. We begin with consultation and fertility assessment first, then discuss options such as lifestyle correction, IUI, IVF, or advanced procedures based on your reports.

Get in Touch

Begin Your Journey

We are Here for You

Speak with our fertility team for a clear diagnosis and a personalized treatment roadmap. Every conversation is private, respectful, and focused on outcomes.
